dashboard.title: Your Learning Spaces
dashboard.empty: No learning spaces yet. Create one to get started!

course.unlock.knowledgeGraph: You now have enough content to generate your Knowledge Graph.
course.unlock.wrongAnswers: Wrong Answers is now available to track recurring mistakes.
course.unlock.forecast: Forecast is now available to predict readiness and retention.
course.unlock.plan: Study Plan is now available to track deadlines and targets.

course.modeSuggestion.examPassed: Your exam deadlines have passed. Switch to Maintenance mode to retain knowledge?
course.modeSuggestion.mastery: You've mastered {mastery}% of concepts. Switch to Maintenance mode?
course.modeSuggestion.errorRateCompact: High error rate with upcoming deadline
course.modeSuggestion.errorRate: Your error rate is above 40% with a deadline approaching. Exam Prep mode focuses on weak spots.
course.modeSuggestion.errorRateDetailed: Your error rate is {rate}% and the nearest deadline is in {days} day(s). Switch to Exam Prep mode to focus on weak spots?

insight.weakTopic.topicDesc: You're struggling with "{topic}". Want a focused quiz?

insight.layout.title: Layout suggestion
insight.layout.desc: Your AI tutor thinks a different template might work better.
insight.featureUnlock.title: New feature unlocked

notes.empty: Upload course materials to generate notes

upload.drag: Drag & drop files here, or click to browse
upload.supported: Supported: PDF, PPTX, DOCX, HTML, TXT, MD

settings.title: Settings
settings.templatesDescription: Apply a template to set your learning preferences. You can always customize later.
settings.runtimeUnavailable: Unable to load runtime health from the API server.
settings.localAiDescription: Run AI completely free and offline with Ollama. Detect your local Ollama instance, pick a model, and switch in one click.
settings.templatesEmpty: No templates available. They will be created on first server start.
settings.status.readyDesc: A real LLM provider is configured and healthy.
settings.status.degradedDesc: A provider is configured, but the active provider is unhealthy or degraded.
settings.status.configurationRequiredDes: This app requires a real LLM provider, but no API key or local backend is configured.
settings.status.mockFallbackDesc: No real LLM is configured. The app is running with local mock responses.
settings.singleUserNote: This project is configured for OpenClaw-style local deployment. There is no end-user sign-in flow by default; the local owner account is bound automatically.
settings.localModeHelp: Keep `AUTH_ENABLED=false` and `DEPLOYMENT_MODE=single_user` for local use. If these drift, run `bash scripts/check_local_mode.sh` before debugging anything else.
settings.migrationHelp: Database migrations are not fully applied or the schema is not tracked by Alembic. Run `bash scripts/dev_local.sh migrate-host`, or use `python -m alembic stamp head` if the tables already match the latest schema.
settings.localBetaDescription: This checklist is tuned for the local single-user beta. Core AI features should only be considered ready when the blockers below are cleared.
settings.localBeta.databaseUnreachable: The API cannot reach the configured local database.
settings.localBeta.schemaNotReady: The local database schema is not ready yet.
settings.localBeta.llmNotReady: A real LLM is not configured or reachable. Chat, notes, quiz generation, flashcards, and planning are blocked.
settings.localBeta.llmDegraded: The configured LLM is reachable but currently unhealthy or degraded.
settings.localBeta.sandboxUnavailable: Docker or Podman is unavailable, so code execution features stay disabled.
settings.providerStorageHelp: Paste provider API keys here for local use. Keys are stored in `apps/api/.env` on this machine and the backend reloads the LLM registry after saving.
settings.apiKeyTooShort: API key must be at least 8 characters
settings.localProviderHelp: No API key is needed. Make sure the local backend for this provider is running, then save this provider as primary.
settings.keepSavedKey: Leave blank to keep the saved key unchanged.
settings.localTestHelp: Connection tests call the local runtime directly.
settings.deleteKeyDescription: This removes the saved API key from local config. You can still keep an unsaved draft in the input field.
settings.savedKeyDeleteFailed: Failed to delete saved provider key
settings.localAiComingSoon: Local AI setup wizard coming soon.
settings.exportDescription: Download all your learning data as a portable SQLite database.
runtimeAlert.llmTitle: Connect a real LLM to unlock AI features
runtimeAlert.llmMockBody: A real LLM is not configured. Chat, notes, quiz generation, flashcards, and planning stay blocked until you connect Ollama or a cloud provider.
runtimeAlert.llmConfigBody: A real LLM is required, but no working provider is configured. AI actions will fail until you connect one.
runtimeAlert.llmDegradedBody: The active provider is unhealthy. Responses may fail, slow down, or fall back unexpectedly.
runtimeAlert.schemaBody: Migrations are not fully applied. Run the migration step before trusting new writes.
runtimeAlert.sandboxBody: Code execution features depend on Docker or Podman. Until that runtime is available, execution tasks may fail.
featureGate.llmTitle: This action needs a real LLM
featureGate.llmBody: Open Settings and connect Ollama or a cloud provider first. Existing saved content still works, but new AI generation is paused.
new.mode.title: How would you like to add content?
new.mode.subtitle: Choose how you want to bring learning materials into your new project.
new.mode.uploadDesc: Upload PDF, PPT, DOCX files from your computer
new.mode.urlDesc: Auto-fetch content from course websites and pages
new.mode.bothDesc: Upload files and scrape URLs together
new.projectNameTooLong: Project name must be 100 characters or fewer
new.dragFiles: Drag files here, or click to browse
new.urlInvalid: URL must start with http:// or https://
new.canvasAuthedBody: Your Canvas session is active. Content will be fetched with your credentials.
new.canvasDetectedBody: This URL requires authentication. Click "Login & Add" to sign in with your university credentials.
new.autoscrapeDesc: Automatically fetch updates from added URLs on a schedule.
new.remindExpiry: Remind me when login session expires
new.processingDesc: Progress now comes directly from backend ingestion jobs. If you enter early, the workspace will keep updating while imports finish.
new.featureTitle: What should Agent do for you?
new.featureSubtitle: Select the features you want to enable for this project. You can change these later.
new.notesFeatureDesc: Restructure your materials into clean, organized notes in your preferred format.
new.practiceFeatureDesc: Generate practice questions from your materials. Interactive Q&A with instant feedback.
new.reviewFeatureDesc: Track, diagnose, and revisit incorrect answers from generated quizzes.
new.planFeatureDesc: Generate a personalized study plan with scheduled reviews.
new.qaFeatureDesc: Ask any question about your materials and get AI-powered answers with source references.
new.extraPrompt: Anything else you'd like to tell Agent?
new.extraPromptPlaceholder: e.g. "Use bullet points for notes", "Focus on algorithms", "Explain in simple terms"...
new.canvasLoginDesc: Sign in with your university credentials to access Canvas course content.
new.allJobsFailed: All ingestion jobs failed. Review the processing log for the backend error details, then go back and retry.
new.credentialsNote: Your credentials are used once to establish a browser session and are not stored.
new.logNoSources: No files or URLs submitted. You can continue and add content later.
new.logAutoScrapeEnabled: Auto-scrape enabled for this URL (every 24 hours)
new.logAuthTip: Tip: Go to Settings to authenticate, then retry.
new.canvasBrowserHelp: Please complete your university login (Okta / SSO / MFA) in the browser window. This dialog will close automatically once login is detected.
new.browserSessionNote: Your session cookies will be saved locally after login. No passwords are stored.
new.loginTimeout: Login timed out or was cancelled. Click Retry to open the browser again.
new.logCanvasOpening: Canvas LMS detected - opening browser for login...
new.logBrowserTip: Tip: Complete login in the browser window, then retry.
onboarding.language.title: What language do you prefer?
onboarding.language.subtitle: Choose the primary language for Agent's responses and generated notes.
onboarding.language.zhDescription: Answer and generate notes in Chinese
onboarding.language.autoDescription: Use the same language as the source material
onboarding.learningMode.title: How do you prefer to learn?
onboarding.learningMode.subtitle: Choose a learning style that suits you best. This helps Agent adapt its teaching approach.
onboarding.learningMode.conceptFirstDesc: Understand theory before practice. Best for building deep understanding.
onboarding.learningMode.practiceFirstDes: Jump into exercises, learn by doing. Review theory as needed.
onboarding.learningMode.balancedDescript: Alternate between concepts and practice for a well-rounded experience.
onboarding.detailLevel.title: How detailed should notes be?
onboarding.detailLevel.subtitle: Choose the level of detail for generated notes and explanations.
onboarding.detailLevel.conciseDescriptio: Key points only. Bullet points and short summaries.
onboarding.detailLevel.balancedDescripti: Balanced depth with explanations where needed.
onboarding.detailLevel.detailedDescripti: In-depth explanations with examples and analogies.
onboarding.layout.title: Choose your workspace layout
onboarding.layout.subtitle: Pick a default layout for your learning workspace. You can change this anytime.
onboarding.layout.balancedDescription: PDF & Notes side by side with chat panel
onboarding.layout.chatFocusedDescription: PDF, Notes, and Chat all visible
onboarding.finish.title: You're all set!
onboarding.finish.subtitle: You can upload example notes or materials later from within any course. Click "Finish Setup" to start learning.
onboarding.summary.title: Your preferences:
onboarding.summary.later: You can upload example notes and materials later from the upload dialog within any course.
onboarding.saved: Preferences saved! Your experience is now personalized.
setup.connectLlmDesc: OpenTutor needs an LLM to power learning. Pick a provider below.
setup.llmTestFailed: Connection test failed. Check your settings and try again.
setup.feedCourseDesc: Give your course a name and upload materials or paste a URL.
setup.templateDescription: Pick a template that fits your learning style. Your AI tutor will customize it over time.
setup.discoveringDesc: Processing your content and finding concepts to test your understanding.
setup.ingestionFailed: Content processing failed. You can still enter the workspace and retry.
setup.interviewTitle: Tell us about your study habits
setup.interviewDescription: Chat with our AI to get a personalized learning layout
mode.title: Learning Mode
mode.description: Choose how you want to study this course.
mode.course_following.desc: Timeline-driven. Deadlines, lecture notes, and syllabus tracking.
mode.self_paced.desc: Exploration-driven. Knowledge graph and topic-based learning.
mode.exam_prep.desc: Practice-heavy. Focus on weak spots and timed practice.
mode.maintenance.desc: Minimal. LECTOR review and knowledge retention only.
mode.confirmSwitch: Switch to this mode? Your block layout will be replaced with the mode default.
home.todayDigest.empty: Start studying to get your personalized daily digest.
home.urgentReviews.empty: No urgent reviews right now. Keep it up!
home.knowledgeDensity.empty: Add more concept data across courses to measure overlap.
home.pendingApprovals.title: Pending Approvals
home.modeRecommendations.title: Mode Recommendations
home.modeRecommendations.empty: No mode transitions recommended right now.
notification.title: Notifications
plan.timeline.empty: No dated goals yet. Add your first deadline to start a syllabus timeline.
plan.path.title: Learning Path
plan.path.empty: No active learning goals yet. Add goals to build a guided concept path.
plan.path.nextUp.empty: No urgent milestones in the next 7 days.
plan.path.suggestedConcepts.empty: Practice more to generate concept-level recommendations.
plan.exam.coverage.empty: Practice data is still building. Coverage checklist will appear soon.
plan.exam.queued: Queued exam prep task for approval in Activity
plan.exam.queueFailed: Failed to queue exam prep task
plan.exam.emptyHint: Generate a focused exam prep plan for this course
plan.exam.taskSummary: Generate a {days}-day exam prep plan in the background.
plan.goals.objectivePlaceholder: What do you want to achieve?
plan.maintenance.empty: No concepts are fading right now. Great retention.
unit.noSiblings: No sibling units at this level.
unit.matchedSignals: {wrong} wrong answers · {mastery} mastery records matched this unit context.
unit.practice.desc: Generate and run practice focused on this unit.
unit.graph.desc: Subgraph focused on this unit and its closest related concepts.
unit.errorPattern.title: Error Pattern Radar
unit.errorPattern.desc: Recurring patterns from your wrong answers for this concept.
unit.errorPattern.empty: No error patterns yet. Solve more questions to reveal pattern clusters.
unit.nextActions.title: Recommended Next Actions
unit.nextActions.desc: Turn insights into action with one click.
unit.errorTrend.title: 7-day Error Trend
unit.difficulty.reason.recovery: Recent errors are rising or mastery is unstable. Reinforce fundamentals first.
unit.difficulty.reason.balanced: Performance is mixed. Use balanced difficulty to consolidate understanding.
unit.difficulty.reason.challenge: Mastery is stable. Increase challenge to improve transfer and exam readiness.
unit.error.empty: No wrong answers recorded for this concept yet.
unit.mastery.empty: No mastery history available for this concept yet.
graph.emptyHint: Upload course materials to generate the knowledge graph.
review.noItems: No items to review right now.
review.completeMessage: You reviewed {count} concept(s). Keep it up!
review.rateFailed: Failed to submit rating. Please retry.
chapter.empty: No content yet. Upload materials to get started.
notification.studyBody: This is your usual study time ({window}). Open OpenTutor to keep your streak going.
unlock.plan: Unlocks after setting a deadline or enabling Course Following mode
unlock.wrongAnswers: Unlocks after your first incorrect answer
unlock.wrongAnswersHint: Answer a question incorrectly to unlock
guidedSession.description: AI-guided learning with warmup, teaching, practice, and review
setup.modeDescription: This determines your page layout, navigation, and how the AI tutor assists you.
flashcard.tapToReveal: Tap card or press Space to reveal answer
flashcard.ariaQuestion: Flashcard showing question. Press Enter or Space to reveal answer.
flashcard.ariaAnswer: Flashcard showing answer. Press Enter or Space to show question.
url.invalidUrl: Please enter a valid URL starting with http:// or https://
error.hint.network: Check your internet connection and try again.
error.hint.auth: You may need to sign in again.
error.hint.server: The server encountered an error. Try again in a moment.
error.hint.rateLimit: Too many requests. Please wait a moment.
error.hint.generic: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
chat.mockWarning: No LLM API key configured. Responses are local fallback text, not AI-generated.
chat.persistenceWarning: Your conversation was not saved. You may need to resend your message.
chat.error.rateLimit: Rate limit reached. Please wait a moment and try again.
chat.error.authError: Authentication error. Check your API key configuration.
chat.error.timeout: Request timed out. The LLM may be overloaded.
chat.error.llmUnavailable: LLM provider is unavailable. Check your connection or configuration.
chat.error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
quiz.progressWarning: Your answer was recorded, but progress tracking may be incomplete.
